basic_details.job_title: SIDAC Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: State Institute for Development of Arts & Crafts (SIDAC)
basic_details.short_information: The State Institute for Development of Arts & Crafts (SIDAC) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website SIDAC Odisha. Have been announced through the SIDAC Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 for Pattachitra, Wood Carving, and Stone Carving disciplines.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 35 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age Relaxation: Retired Govt. Instructors up to 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: HSC (10th standard) or equivalent (exempted for Awardees)
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (Pattachitra), Guest Faculty (Wood Carving), Guest Faculty (Stone Carving): HSC (exempted for Awardee), empanelled MCP under Directorate of Handicrafts Odisha, 36 months experience, own production unit, ToT completed (exempted for Awardee)

salary_details.details: Guest Faculty (Pattachitra): Rs. 22500 Per Month Guest Faculty (Wood Carving): Rs. 20000 - 22500 Per Month Guest Faculty (Stone Carving): Rs. 20000 - 22500 Per Month

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Evaluation based on experience and awards Personal Interview Merit list preparation
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sidac.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
